properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6 v2 v3 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're all on a journey, and we're called to walk by faith They'll always be the mountains and valleys in our way But right here in this moment may our strength be renewed As we recall what God has done and how we've seen him move

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If there's anybody here who's found him faithful Anybody here who knows he's able Say, "Amen"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If there's anybody here who's seen his power Anybody here brought through the fire Say, "Amen"

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Anybody here found joy in the midst of sorrow Peace in the storm, hope for tomorrow And you've seen it time and time again Just say, "Amen"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Sometimes through the darkness it gets hard to see But, be bold and courageous, and follow where he leads Greater is the one who's in us than he who's in the world So child of God, remember the battle is the Lord's

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Just stand and testify of the greatness of God in our lives

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Just say, "Amen" Just say, "Amen", ooh Just say, "Amen" (just say, "Amen", just say "Amen")
